pages.text: Drop a catalyst item into a placed Slime Milk source to upgrade it:$(br2)Count adds more spawns before it drains. Speed shortens the wait between spawns. Quantity spawns more slimes at once. Endless makes the source never run dry.
Stack them up to turn one source into a steady, hands-off supply. Look at a source with Jade to see its remaining spawns and which upgrades it carries.
